titleStmt.title: SII 39.34: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 34. (A.R. No. 34 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. MĀṞA[VARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN]-KULAŚĒKHA[RADĒVA], [WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL] COUNTRIE, 18th YEAR (1386 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the worship of an image in the sub-shrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-Nāchchiyār, which was installed in the temple of Tiruchchaṉṉavaṉa-muḍaiya-[Nāyaṉār], by the king's aunt (Attaiyāḻvār). Mentions Kaṇḍiyūrnāḍāḻvāṉ and Vikrama-Pāṇḍya-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kirttikkumel śrīkomāṟa ttikaḷ maṇṭalamu ya kulacekhara tevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu kaṇṭiyūr n(āṭā)ḻvāṉ
Ūṭaiyā(r) tiruccaṉṉavaṉamuṭaiyaṉā tārkku nam Attaiyāḻvār Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Eḻuntaru(ḷuvit)ta tirukkāmakkoṭṭa nācciyār koyilile na
vārattil civappirāmaṇaṉ tillaiyā ṭaiya Aiñcunāḷ kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom I(p)paṭik kalliluc cempilum veṭṭi cittirai mātam mutal cantirātittavaṟ kāṭ(ṭi)ku
ṭukka 2 Ippaṭikku Itile nammeḻuttumiṭṭaṭom Ippaṭikku (iv)ai vikramapāṇṭiya muventaveḷāṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
